parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your landing page copy is ready, ' + ($json.first_name || $json.business_name || 'there') + '!' }}
parameters.message:
=

Your Landing Page Copy is Ready!

Hi {{ $json.first_name || $json.business_name }},

Hero Headline: {{ $json.hero_headline }}

Subheadline: {{ $json.hero_subheadline }}

CTA: {{ $json.hero_cta }}

View the full copy in your maroa.ai dashboard.

Best,
The maroa.ai team

parameters.url: ={{ "https://maroa-api-production.up.railway.app/api/context/" + String($json.userId || $json.business_id || $json.user_id || $json.id || ($json.biz && $json.biz.id) || $('Loop Each Business').first().json.id || $('Loop Each Business').first().json.user_id || $('Split In Batches').first().json.id || $('Split In Batches').first().json.user_id || $vars.userId || "") }}
